description: For the fiery and hot-tempered, here's a pair of sandals to match your temperament. In olive and black, lotto's Sting floaters, inspired by the scorpion, look great with jeans, bermudas or cargoes Wear it with a bright tee. Upper Fabric midfoot and ankle straps with aggressive contrast stitch detailing for durability Two criss-cross midfoot straps attached to the ankle strap with a rubber brand badge Velcro fastening on the ankle straps Cushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole for maximum comfort Scorpion print for style Outsole TPU rubber outsole with fire patterned lugs for grip and traction Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
